landing.title: Transform your audio into text
landing.subtitle: Automatic AI-powered transcription. Upload, transcribe and translate your audio and video files in a few clicks.

features.title: Easy Upload
features.desc: Drag and drop your audio or video files. Supports MP3, MP4, WAV and more.

features.title: Whisper AI
features.desc: Powered by OpenAI Whisper, the most advanced speech recognition technology.

features.title: Multi-language
features.desc: Automatic detection and translation to over 10 different languages.

features.title: Flexible Export
features.desc: Download as TXT or SRT for your video and subtitle projects.

features.title: Secure
features.desc: Files automatically deleted after transcription. GDPR compliant.

steps.title: Transcribe
steps.desc: Our AI automatically analyzes and transcribes your content.

cookie.title: We use cookies
cookie.message: This site uses essential cookies for functionality and analytics cookies to improve your experience. In accordance with GDPR, we ask for your consent.
cookie.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how you use the site.

sections.title: 1. Introduction
sections.content: VxScrib is committed to protecting the privacy of its users. This privacy policy describes how we collect, use and protect your personal data, in accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR - EU 2016/679).

sections.title: 2. Data Controller
sections.content: The data controller is VxScrib. For any questions about your data, contact us at: privacy@transcriptflow.com

sections.title: 3. Data Collected
sections.content:
We collect the following data:
- Registration data: name, email address, password (hashed)
- Audio/video files: temporarily uploaded for transcription, then automatically deleted
- Transcriptions: text generated from your audio files
- Technical data: IP address, browser type, preferred language
- Cookies: essential (session) and analytics (with consent)

sections.title: 4. Legal Basis for Processing
sections.content:
The processing of your data is based on:
- Your explicit consent (Article 6.1.a of the GDPR)
- Performance of the service contract (Article 6.1.b)
- Our legitimate interests to improve the service (Article 6.1.f)

sections.title: 5. Purpose of Processing
sections.content:
Your data is used to:
- Provide the audio transcription service
- Manage your user account
- Improve service quality
- Communicate with you about your account

sections.title: 6. Data Retention
sections.content:
- Audio files: deleted immediately after transcription
- Transcriptions: retained until deleted by the user
- Account data: retained until account deletion
- Technical logs: 12 months maximum

sections.title: 7. Your Rights (GDPR)
sections.content:
Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:
- Right of access: view your personal data
- Right to rectification: correct your data
- Right to erasure (right to be forgotten): delete your account and all your data
- Right to portability: export your data in a readable format
- Right to object: object to the processing of your data
- Right to restriction: restrict processing

To exercise these rights, use the options available in your profile or contact us.

sections.title: 8. Data Security
sections.content:
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures:
- Password encryption (bcrypt)
- Secure HTTPS connections
- Restricted access to personal data
- Automatic deletion of audio files after processing

sections.title: 9. International Transfers
sections.content: Your data may be transferred to servers outside the EU for AI processing (OpenAI Whisper). These transfers are governed by standard contractual clauses compliant with the GDPR.

sections.title: 10. Contact
sections.content:
For any questions about this policy or your personal data:
Email: privacy@transcriptflow.com

You may also file a complaint with your local data protection authority.

sections.title: 1. Purpose
sections.content: These terms govern the use of the VxScrib service, an AI-powered audio transcription tool.

sections.title: 2. Registration
sections.content: Using the service requires creating an account. You agree to provide accurate information and maintain the confidentiality of your credentials.

sections.title: 3. Transcription Service
sections.content: VxScrib provides an AI-based automatic transcription service. Transcription accuracy depends on audio quality and is not guaranteed at 100%.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property
sections.content: You retain ownership of your audio files and generated transcriptions. VxScrib does not claim any rights to your content.

sections.title: 5. Acceptable Use
sections.content:
You agree not to use the service to:
- Transcribe illegal content or content that infringes others' rights
- Intentionally overload the service
- Attempt to access other users' data

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: VxScrib shall not be liable for transcription errors, service interruptions, or data loss.

sections.title: 7. Data Protection
sections.content: The processing of your personal data is governed by our Privacy Policy, in compliance with the GDPR.

sections.title: 8. Changes to Terms
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms. Users will be notified of any significant changes.

sections.title: 9. Termination
sections.content: You can delete your account at any time. VxScrib reserves the right to suspend or delete an account in case of violation of these terms.

sections.title: 10. Governing Law
sections.content: These terms are governed by French law. In case of dispute, French courts shall have exclusive jurisdiction.
